projectDescription: A Laravel + Livewire web application for configuring, quoting, and generating technical 2D plans for aluminum windows and doors with automatic dimension calculations.
keyFeatures: Dynamic aluminum window and door configuration with real-time 2D technical plan generation
Support for multiple window systems: Sistema Nova, Persiana, Doble Corrediza, Batiente, Proyectante
Support for multiple door types: Clásica, Personalizable, Corrediza 1/2 hoja, 2 hojas
Automatic dimension calculations for adjusted widths, bridge heights, and glass measurements
Multi-window batch management with add, switch, and delete capabilities
Detailed fabrication summary with aluminum profile codes and quantities
PDF export of technical plans and fabrication summaries
Accessories calculation (garruchas, pestillos, topes) based on configuration
Excel-based profile catalog integration for product name lookups
Session-based state persistence for multi-item workflows
publicApiSurface: GET / — Welcome/home screen with module selector
GET /plano-imprimir — Printable 2D technical plans for windows (route: plano.imprimir)
GET /puertas-imprimir — Printable 2D technical plans for doors (route: puertas.imprimir)
Livewire: ventanas.app — Window system selector component
Livewire: ventanas.sistema-nova — Sistema Nova full configurator with dimension logic
Livewire: puertas.app — Door system selector component
Livewire: puertas.corrediza1hoja — Single-leaf sliding door configurator
Livewire: puertas.corrediza2hoja — Double-leaf sliding door configurator
